body: This PR unifies the signal handlers and their caches-- I think having them split just complicated the `needs_update!` interface.
title: Simplify signal handlers

body: This PR will allow us to overload custom implementations of `step_u!` based on the algorithm name (e.g., `ARS343`). This is a non-breaking change, so we can experiment with the time stepping in ClimaAtmos and port here once we finalize the form.
title: Allow for specializing on the algorithm name (type)
